    137 +func BenchmarkCacheMixedParallel(b *testing.B) {
    138 +       const keyCount = 20000
    139 +       c := New[int](Config{
    140 +               Shards:     64,
    141 +               MaxEntries: keyCount,
    142 +       })
    143 +       b.Cleanup(c.Close)
    144 +       keys := make([]string, keyCount)
    145 +       for i := 0; i < keyCount; i++ {
    146 +               k := "k" + strconv.Itoa(i)
    147 +               keys[i] = k
    148 +               c.Set(k, i, 0)
    149 +       }
    150 +
    151 +       var seq atomic.Uint64
    152 +       b.ReportAllocs()
    153 +       b.ResetTimer()
    154 +       b.RunParallel(func(pb *testing.PB) {
    155 +               for pb.Next() {
    156 +                       idx := int(seq.Add(1) % keyCount)
    157 +                       key := keys[idx]
    158 +                       if idx%4 == 0 {
    159 +                               c.Set(key, idx, time.Second)
    160 +                       } else {
    161 +                               c.Get(key)
    162 +                       }
    163 +               }
    164 +       })
    165 +}

─ Worked for 1m 17s ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

• 테스트/벤치 파일까지 추가했습니다. 지금 바로 정리(gofmt)와 단위 테스트/벤치 실행을 돌려 컴파일 및 동작을 확인하겠습니
  다.

✔ You approved codex to run gofmt -w internal/cache/cache.go internal/cache/cache_test.go this time

• Ran gofmt -w internal/cache/cache.go internal/cache/cache_test.go
  └ (no output)

✔ You approved codex to run go test ./internal/cache -run Test -count=1 this time

• Ran go test ./internal/cache -run Test -count=1
  └ ok      github.com/dh-kam/yollo/internal/cache    0.163s


  Would you like to run the following command?

  Reason: 요청하신 benchmark 테스트 결과를 확인하기 위해 cache 패키지 벤치마크를 실행해도 될까요?

  $ go test ./internal/cache -run ^$ -bench . -benchmem -count=1

› 1. Yes, proceed (y)
  2. Yes, and don't ask again for commands that start with `go test ./internal/cache -run ^$ -bench . -benchmem
     -count=1` (p)
  3. No, and tell Codex what to do differently (esc)

  Press enter to confirm or esc to cancel
